moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosted across the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing with group stage matches taking place daily until July 19.

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: Another day, another set of World Cup fixtures! Who are you backing to make it out of the group stage today? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK Fan Focus
angles.copy: Even without a home nation playing today, the World Cup drama is unmissable. What's been the biggest shock or standout performance so far?

moments.title: Royal Ascot Concludes
moments.blurb: The prestigious Royal Ascot horse racing festival wraps up its five-day event on Saturday, June 20, known for its high fashion, royal presence, and top-class racing.

angles.name: Fashion & Fun
angles.copy: It's the final day of Royal Ascot! Who's had their eye on the fashion as much as the horses this week? What an event!

angles.name: Racing Highlights
angles.copy: One last chance for glory at Royal Ascot today. Which race are you most looking forward to and who's your pick for the Gold Cup?

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival features Sophie Ellis-Bextor's Palace Disco tonight, June 19, and '80s Classical with special guests on June 20, set against the historic backdrop.

angles.name: Sophie Ellis-Bextor Tonight
angles.copy: Sophie Ellis-Bextor brings the Palace Disco to Hampton Court tonight! Who's ready to get their groove on in a truly regal setting?

angles.name: 80s Classical Tomorrow
angles.copy: Tomorrow at Hampton Court Palace Festival, it's '80s Classical! Get set for iconic tunes reimagined. What's your favourite 80s anthem?

moments.title: UK Festivals Live This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival (June 18-21) and TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow (June 19-21) are both live this weekend, bringing major artists and crowds across the UK.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Isle of Wight and TRNSMT are both ON this weekend! If you're there, let us know who you're most excited to see!

angles.name: TRNSMT Glasgow
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing as TRNSMT kicks off today! Who's heading to Glasgow Green for a weekend of live music? #TRNSMTFestival

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Lionel Richie!
moments.blurb: Legendary singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, June 20, 2026.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Lionel Richie turns 77! What's your go-to Lionel track – 'Hello,' 'All Night Long,' or something else?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Lionel Richie's 77th birthday tomorrow! From The Commodores to his solo hits, his music is timeless. What's your favourite memory associated with his songs?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Sunday, June 21st! It's the longest day of the year – how will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Midsummer Vibes
angles.copy: Midsummer is almost here! The Summer Solstice on Sunday means maximum daylight. What's your favourite thing about summer evenings?

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday, Lana Del Rey!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday, June 21, 2026.

angles.name: Lana's Day
angles.copy: Sunday is Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday! Which of her beautifully melancholic tracks is your ultimate favourite?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 41st birthday to the unique Lana Del Rey this Sunday! Her cinematic sound has truly defined a generation. What's your favourite album?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Premieres
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's 'House of the Dragon' begins streaming on Monday, June 22, 2026, on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max.

angles.name: Return to Westeros
angles.copy: Dragons are back! House of the Dragon Season 3 drops Monday. Are you ready for more Targaryen drama and political intrigue?

angles.name: Winter is Coming (Again)
angles.copy: What are your predictions for House of the Dragon S3, starting Monday? No spoilers from the books, please!

moments.title: Remembering George Michael
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who passed away in 2016, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday on June 25, 2026.

angles.name: Wham! to Solo
angles.copy: On June 25th, we remember the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63. His legacy, from Wham! to his groundbreaking solo career, lives on forever. What's your all-time favourite George Michael song?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Thinking of George Michael on June 25th, what would have been his 63rd birthday. His voice and songwriting were truly exceptional. Which of his hits still gives you chills?

moments.title: Morvala Festival Kicks Off in Cornwall
moments.blurb: The new Morvala Festival of Arts, featuring a diverse lineup including Embrace, Hawkwind, Fink, Billie Marten, and The Feeling, takes place at Mount Edgcumbe in Cornwall from June 25-28, 2026.

angles.name: Cornwall Calling
angles.copy: New festival alert! Morvala Festival launches in Cornwall next week, June 25-28, with a brilliant, eclectic lineup. Who's heading down South West?

angles.name: Mount Edgcumbe Vibes
angles.copy: Morvala Festival is bringing live music and arts to the stunning Mount Edgcumbe from June 25th. Which acts are you hoping to catch?

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Ariana Grande!
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 next Thursday, June 26th. What's your ultimate Ariana bop?

angles.name: Ariana's Hits
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to Ariana Grande next week! From 'Thank U, Next' to '7 Rings,' she's given us so many anthems. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 Streams on Disney+
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' begins streaming on Disney+ from Thursday, June 26, 2026.

angles.name: Chef's Kiss TV
angles.copy: Yes, Chef! The Bear Season 5 arrives on Disney+ next Thursday, June 26. Who's ready for more high-pressure kitchen drama?

angles.name: More Chaos Cooking
angles.copy: Get your aprons ready, The Bear is back for Season 5 on Disney+ next week! What's your favourite dish from the show you'd love to try?

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Debuts
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off on Saturday, June 27, 2026, featuring headliners like Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé across multiple dates.

angles.name: New Festival Launch
angles.copy: A brand new festival is coming to Blenheim Palace from Saturday! Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé are among the stars. Which night are you most excited for?

angles.name: Star-Studded Lineup
angles.copy: The stunning Blenheim Palace is hosting its first festival starting June 27th! Imagine seeing Alanis Morissette or Katy Perry in that setting. Pure magic!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships are set to begin on Monday, June 29, 2026, running for two weeks at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon starts in just 10 days, on June 29th. Who are you backing for the singles titles this year?

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: The iconic grass courts of Wimbledon await! The Championships begin June 29th. What's your favourite part of the Wimbledon experience?
